heading: Report
label: 7621 Report
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section on , see subsec. (d) of this section.Sept. 30, 2028

References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Eliminate, Neutralize, and Disrupt Wildlife Trafficking Act of 2016, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note under and Tables.Pub. L. 114–231130 Stat. 949section 7601 of this titleOct. 7, 2016

children.heading: Report
children.label: a Report
children.text: Not later than one year after , and biennially thereafter by June 1 of each year in which a report is required, the Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior and the Secretary of Commerce, shall submit to Congress a report that lists each country determined by the Secretary of State to be a focus country within the meaning of this chapter.October 7, 2016

children.heading: Special designation
children.label: b Special designation
children.text: In each report required under subsection (a), the Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior and the Secretary of Commerce, shall also list each country determined by the Secretary of State to be a country of concern within the meaning of this chapter1So in original. Probably should be followed by a period.1

children.heading: Procedure for removing countries from list
children.label: c Procedure for removing countries from list
children.text: Concurrently with the first report required under this section and submitted after , the Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior and the Secretary of Commerce, shall publish in the Federal Register a procedure for removing from the list described in subsection (b) any country that no longer meets the definition of country of concern under .December 23, 2022section 7601(4) of this title

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: d Sunset
children.text: This section shall cease to have force or effect on .September 30, 2028
